data_description.event_prefix: The common prefix of all ESPHome homeassistant.event calls in your YAML, e.g. 'esphome.test_node' for events like esphome.test_node_finger_scan_matched.
data_description.esphome_device: Device name as used in HA services (hyphens replaced by underscores), e.g. 'esphome_garage_fingerprint'. Used to call enroll/delete actions.
data_description.sensor_entity_id: Optional: sensor entity that shows the last matched finger ID. Only needed if you do not use event_prefix.

error.entity_not_found: The selected sensor entity was not found. Make sure the ESPHome device is online.
The selected sensor entity was not found.
